title: Ashokdham Temple
tagline: Ashokdham Temple — spiritual town of Bihar

overview.short: Ashokdham Mandir also known as Indradamneshwar Mahadev Mandir is located at ASHOK DHAM RAJAUNA CHOUKI in Lakhisarai district, Bihar.
overview.description: Ashokdham Mandir also known as Indradamneshwar Mahadev Mandir is located at ASHOK DHAM RAJAUNA CHOUKI in Lakhisarai district, Bihar. It is a temple complex having Indradamneshwar Mahadev Mandir in the center dedicated to the primary deity lord Shiva surrounded by three more temples dedicated to Goddess Parvati, the mount of the Shiva Nandi and Goddess Durga. On 11 February 1993, the Shankaracharya of Jagannathpuri inaugurated the reconstruction of the temple complex.

topPlaces.name: Balgudar
topPlaces.description: Balgudar is a village Located in the Lakhisarai District of Bihar, India, with a total 1200 families residing. The total population of the village is 7,326, of which 3654 are males while 3672 are females.

topPlaces.name: Nandnama
topPlaces.description: Nandnama or Nand Nama is a village in the Ramgarh Chowk Block of the Lakhisarai district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is 14 km south of the administrative district headquarters in Lakhisarai and 134 km from the state capital, Patna.

topPlaces.name: Lakhisarai
topPlaces.description: Lakhisarai (archaic spelling: Luckeesarai) town is the administrative headquarters of Lakhisarai district in the Indian state of Bihar. The town has a population of 99,979 (2011 census).

topPlaces.name: Babhangawan
topPlaces.description: Babhangawan is a village located in the Lakhisarai district of Bihar, India. The village has a population of 3,737 as of the 2011 Census.

topPlaces.name: Krimila
topPlaces.description: Kṛmilā was a Buddhist religious and administrative centre located in what is now Lakhisarai district in Bihar. Spread in an area around 25–30 square kilometres, the city has a large number of historical monuments, particularly Buddhist Stupas and Hindu temples.

topPlaces.name: Jaitpur
topPlaces.description: Jaitpur is a village and a Gram panchayat under Barahiya Tehsil in Lakhisarai district of Bihar, India.

items.note: Balgudar is a village Located in the Lakhisarai District of Bihar, India, with a total 1200 families residing. The total population of the village is 7,326, of which 3654 are males while 3672 are females.

Nandnama or Nand Nama is a village in the Ramgarh Chowk Block of the Lakhisarai district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is 14 km south of the administrative district headquarters in Lakhisarai and 134 km from the state capital, Patna.
Lakhisarai (archaic spelling: Luckeesarai) town is the administrative headquarters of Lakhisarai district in the Indian state of Bihar. The town has a population of 99,979 (2011 census).
Babhangawan is a village located in the Lakhisarai district of Bihar, India. The village has a population of 3,737 as of the 2011 Census.

Kṛmilā was a Buddhist religious and administrative centre located in what is now Lakhisarai district in Bihar. Spread in an area around 25–30 square kilometres, the city has a large number of historical monuments, particularly Buddhist Stupas and Hindu temples.
Jaitpur is a village and a Gram panchayat under Barahiya Tehsil in Lakhisarai district of Bihar, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ashokdham Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ashokdham Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ashokdham Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Patna Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ashokdham Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ashokdham Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ashokdham Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ashokdham Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ashokdham Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Balgudar, Nandnama, Lakhisarai, Babhangawan, Krimila.
